SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.storage.rocksdb

Class RocksDbMailboxStore

java.lang.Object
com.mimecast.robin.storage.rocksdb.RocksDbMailboxStore
All Implemented Interfaces:
MailboxStore, Closeable, AutoCloseable
public class RocksDbMailboxStore extends Object implements MailboxStore
RocksDB-backed mailbox store for Robin webmail-style access patterns.
